base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ken — a character (playable) from 1991 street fighter ii. Ken Masters — red-gi shoto, flame-Shoryuken variant. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
